creator: datahead4@gmail.com
text:
The attached patch updates the proposed changes for mysql51-server to
version 5.1.30 and adds proposed changes for mysql50-server against
version 5.0.75.  I've also removed one of the mysqlXX-embedded patch
files and added a CFLAG for "-fPIC" for both embedded libraries to fix
a linking problem on amd64.  These ports compile on i386 and amd64
tinderboxes and work as expected when used to compile Amarok 2.

Matt
